sourcePrompt: A king cobra reared to strike, the front third of a three-meter body raised vertically about a meter off the ground. The neck spreads into a broad flattened hood below a level, forward-fixed head, while the remaining body pools behind in two settled coils. Dark olive-brown scales with faint pale chevron bands, the belly paler. Poised, taut and dangerous. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
